title: brachistus diversifolius
intro: Brachistus diversifolius, also known as the tree daisy or tree marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Brachistus diversifolius include treating fever, cough, and sore throat, as well as providing relief from digestive issues and respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used to make a topical paste or ointment for skin conditions and wounds.
